name: yandex-telemost
title: Yandex Telemost
description: Create and join Yandex Telemost meetings directly from Raycast. Requires macOS — uses AppleScript to automate your browser.
author: egor_chuzhin

commands.name: new-meeting
commands.title: New Meeting
commands.subtitle: Yandex Telemost
commands.description: Create a new Yandex Telemost meeting and copy the link to clipboard

commands.name: new-meeting-refocus
commands.title: New Meeting and Refocus
commands.subtitle: Yandex Telemost
commands.description: Create a new Yandex Telemost meeting, copy the link, and return focus to the previous app

commands.name: join-meeting
commands.title: Join Meeting
commands.subtitle: Yandex Telemost
commands.description: Join a Yandex Telemost meeting by link or code

preferences.name: browser
preferences.title: Preferred Browser
preferences.description: Browser to open Telemost in. If not set, uses the currently active browser.
